cases.description: Preset theme selection triggers the skill
cases.prompt: apply a theme to my slide deck — show me what's available
expectations: Shows references to the 10 themes listed (or the theme-showcase.pdf)
Reads the chosen theme file from references/themes/
Applies colors and fonts consistently to the deck

cases.prompt: re-theme this deck with a more corporate look
expectations: Suggests themes matching 'corporate' (e.g., Modern Minimalist, Tech Innovation)
Applies the chosen theme to every slide

cases.description: Custom theme generation triggers the skill
cases.prompt: create a custom theme with deep emerald and warm gold accents
expectations: Generates a new theme with a descriptive name
Shows the theme for review before applying

cases.description: Full brand identity request does NOT trigger theme-factory
cases.prompt: build a full brand identity system for our SaaS startup
expectations: Does NOT just apply a preset theme

cases.description: New design-from-scratch does NOT trigger theme-factory
cases.prompt: design a new poster for our event
expectations: Does NOT reuse a preset theme as the primary design direction
